name: N.D. Rubber Public Company Limited
summary: N.D. Rubber Public Company Limited, together with its subsidiaries, manufactures and distributes motorcycle tires and tubes in Thailand and internationally. The company offers street, scooter, and off road tires; motorcycle tubes; and air lock, a replacement to motorcycle tube that retains air pressure of tire on spoke rim. It also manufactures and distributes rubber and synthetic products for automobiles and motorcycles; manufactures and sells automotive rubber parts; distributes batteries for cars, automobiles, and motorcycles, as well as provides related services; and distributes bicycle tires and tubes, and footwear. In addition, the company researches, develops, manufactures, and distributes wireless electrical equipment and systems, and power transmission equipment. N.D. Rubber Public Company Limited was incorporated in 1990 and is headquartered in Chonburi, Thailand.
